meta.notes: This file is the manual fallback. Live data is fetched from api.warframestat.us first. Edit this file to update content when the API does not cover an activity.

weekly.title: Archon Hunt
weekly.desc: 3-mission weekly hunt against a powered Sentient Archon. Rewards Archon Shards used for permanent build upgrades.

weekly.title: Deep Archimedea (EDA)
weekly.desc: Endurance mission with rotating restrictions and modifiers. Highest source of Tauforged Archon Shards in the game.

weekly.title: Temporal Archimedea
weekly.desc: High-difficulty Archimedea variant with unique weekly reward pool. Uses a Search Pulse to enter.

weekly.title: The Circuit (Duviri)
weekly.desc: Roguelike endless mode set in Duviri. Primary source of Incarnon Genesis adapters for older weapons.

weekly.title: Syndicate Standing Cap
weekly.desc: Hit your weekly standing cap across your chosen syndicates. Run syndicate missions or use medallions.

daily.title: Sortie
daily.desc: 3-stage daily mission chain with unique modifiers. Rewards include Rivens, Ayatan sculptures, Forma, and Exilus adapters.

daily.title: Netracell
daily.desc: High-tier assassination using a Search Pulse. One recommended per day. Strong source of Archon Shards and rare mods.

daily.title: Syndicate Daily Missions
daily.desc: Run daily syndicate missions to build standing toward your weekly cap. 5 missions available per syndicate per day.

daily.title: Void Fissures
daily.desc: Run fissure missions to crack Void Relics and earn Prime parts. Rotates every few hours.

notes.eda_modifiers: EDA modifiers are not available via API. Check https://warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Deep_Archimedea or the in-game Chrysalith for current week restrictions.
notes.search_pulses: 5 Search Pulses reset every Monday 00:00 UTC. Split between Netracells, EDA, and Temporal Archimedea.
notes.baro: Baro Ki'Teer arrives every two weeks on Friday and leaves Sunday. The API provides live status.
